questionHtml:
A cell from the lungs, observed under the microscope, contains a large number of secretory organelles. Which conclusion can be drawn about the cell?

A. It is a type I pneumocyte.

B. It is a type II pneumocyte.

C. It could be either a type I or type II pneumocyte.

D. It is a red blood cell.

meta.title: A cell from the lungs, observed under the microscope, contains a large number of secretory organelles. Which conclusion can be drawn about the cell? A. It is a type I pneumocyte. B
